auth.resetSent: If an account exists, a reset link has been sent.
auth.confirmEmailSent: Check your email to confirm your account before signing in.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Current period: {start} to {end}
dashboard.aiUnavailable: AI review is not configured yet.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Add income or an expense to start seeing your financial picture.

records.viewerBlocked: Your current role can view this workspace but cannot modify records.
records.incomeBlocked: Only owners and admins can manage income.
records.validationAmount: Enter an amount greater than zero.

categories.title: Categories
categories.viewerBlocked: Your current role can view categories but cannot manage them.

periodSelector.label: Reporting period
periodSelector.invalidRange: End date must be on or after the start date.
periodSelector.rangeTooLarge: Choose a range of 366 days or less.

trend.title: Spending trend
trend.empty: No trend data for this period.

topMerchants.title: Top merchants
topMerchants.empty: No merchant spending for this period.

teamActivity.title: Team activity
teamActivity.empty: No confirmed team records for this period.
teamActivity.recordCount: {count, plural, one {# confirmed record} other {# confirmed records}}

pendingReview.title: Pending review
pendingReview.count: {count} AI extraction {count, plural, one {result} other {results}} awaiting review

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Current period: {start} to {end}
reports.emptyDescription: Add income or an expense to see a report for this period.

summary.title: Spending summary
summary.empty: No confirmed records in this period yet.
summary.noTopCategory: No spending category stood out in this period.
summary.trendUp: Spending increased versus the previous comparable period.
summary.trendDown: Spending decreased versus the previous comparable period.
summary.trendFlat: Spending stayed roughly the same versus the previous comparable period.

history.title: Activity history
history.emptyDescription: Only activity from this phase onward appears here.
history.notAuthorized: Only owners and admins can view activity history.

aiSummary.title: AI spending summary
aiSummary.unavailable: AI summaries are available after an owner configures an AI key.
aiSummary.notAuthorized: Your current role cannot request an AI summary.
aiSummary.error: The AI summary could not be generated. The rest of the report is still available.

settings.title: Settings
settings.aiDescription: AI is optional and not yet configured. You can add and confirm income and expenses manually without it.

aiSettings.title: AI settings
aiSettings.removeDescription: The stored key will be deleted from Vault and this workspace will return to not configured.
aiSettings.manualFirstNote: Saving a key does not trigger AI work in this phase.

status.noKeyHint: No provider key is stored for this workspace.

formatHints.gemini: Gemini keys start with AIza and are 35-45 characters.
formatHints.openai: OpenAI keys start with sk- and are at least 20 characters.

errors.invalidKeyFormat: Use a key that matches the selected provider format.

files.title: Files
files.emptyState: No receipt or invoice files yet.

upload.title: Upload receipt or invoice
upload.hint: PNG, JPEG, WebP, or PDF up to 10 MB.

autoDelete.label: Auto-delete after extraction
autoDelete.description: When extraction is available, delete original files only after a successful extraction.

errors.unsupportedFileType: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WebP, or PDF file.
errors.fileTooLarge: Files must be 10 MB or smaller.
errors.emptyFile: Upload a file that is not empty.
errors.forbidden: Your current role cannot perform this file action.

failureReasons.invalid_key: The configured AI key was rejected by the provider.
failureReasons.rate_limited: The AI provider is rate-limiting requests. Try again shortly.
failureReasons.timeout: The AI provider did not respond in time.
failureReasons.unreadable_file: The file could not be read for extraction.
failureReasons.malformed_response: The AI provider returned an unexpected response.
failureReasons.provider_error: The AI provider returned an error.

discard.description: No expense will be created, and the file will stay available.

review.title: Review extraction
review.autoDeleteNotice: This file will be removed after you confirm, because auto-delete is on for this workspace.

errors.aiNotConfigured: Configure an AI provider key before triggering extraction.
errors.extractionInProgress: This file already has an extraction in progress.
errors.alreadyResolved: This extraction has already been resolved.
errors.forbidden: Your current role cannot perform this extraction action.
errors.invalidRequest: Check the amount and date and try again.
